prompt: Emulate the neon tube glow, color halo, and slight tube bend reflections.
prompt_refined: Edit Image 1, the typographic design, to render its colored elements and letters as glowing neon tubes. Apply a distinct neon tube glow and corresponding color halos to each segment. Additionally, incorporate subtle reflections characteristic of slightly bent neon glass tubes, drawing visual inspiration from Image 2 for the overall luminous and reflective quality.
objects: Letters rendered as glowing neon tubes
Colored geometric shapes and patterns rendered as glowing neon tubes
Distinct neon tube glow around each segment
Color halos corresponding to each neon segment
Subtle reflections on the neon tubes
Slightly bent appearance of neon glass tubes
Original color scheme (red, yellow, teal/cyan, dark pink/magenta, white/cream) applied to neon elements
